content_clean: 瑕不掩瑜的一作 在关卡设计上确实有一些问题，比如地图引导做的很弱，路痴很容易迷路，空气墙很多，以及类似魂游在一些地方会遇到非常恶心的怪物配置，还有魂游老生畅常谈的快慢刀战斗系统我觉得远远超出预期，用手柄体验非常好，可以通过幻化为其他形态来增加招式和弥补短板，同时额外的血量大大提高了容错率。三种棍法类似《仁王》的架势，输出以积攒棍势为核心，重击为主要输出手段，三种棍法都是有特点的，劈棍可以蓄力与敌人周旋，立棍攻守兼备，戳棍手长，再搭配上一些武器和防具完全可以根据自己的喜好自行加点打造一套build画面非常的出色，演出表演也很到位，两者都不输目前的业界大作目前似乎一些人会遇上闪退和帧数不稳的优化问题，我在13600kf+4090+32gb 6400Mhz的环境下2K分辨率下DLAA打开帧生成，画质全影视级和光追最高的情况下可以稳定60帧以上，但是听朋友说自己的机器掉帧很严重，可能确实存在一些优化问题俗话说万事开头难，虽然确实存在问题，但是本作绝对是国产游戏的一块里程碑，希望将来我们能玩到更加优秀的国产游戏

content_clean: 个人西行之路：略带失望的旅途 如果说，以中国单机买断的视角审视，黑神话不失为一里程碑式的作品，他精美的建模，及其逼真的环境，都让人在刚进入游戏时令人惊呼，丰富的资源库也为后来者的游戏开发留下了宝贵财富，值得称赞；但今日，我想以一个普通的游戏玩家视角来看，以黑神话的游戏性来说，令我感到失望和遗憾。 缺点： 1.极其差劲的引导 由于引擎或是开发经验不足，黑神话在同一场景下游戏环境及其相似，缺少区分度，在同一环境下，道路很难辨别。在BOSS战结束后，也缺少明确的镜头指引或者暗示，告诉玩家下一步应该怎么做，我很少以极其差劲来形容一款游戏的引导，在黑神话这个游戏中，迷路是经常的事情，在游玩这种宽线性或是开放世界的游戏时，我很想把每一个角落都搜刮干净，但是你有时搜寻一番后却发现一个已经到过的地方，其次导致玩家探索体验极差的原因不仅仅如此 2.过多的，冷血的空气墙 相对于久被人诟病的“门不能从此处打开”，在你整个探索完后，你或许想想这句话似乎有点黑色幽默的意味，但也告诉你可以探索一条路从而“曲径通幽”，这或许已经是一种引导较差，浇灭玩家继续探索的方式了，但是黑神话的方式显得更为冷酷无情，本就缺少区分度的环境下，许多空气墙更是当头一棒。当你迷路时，或者想四处探索时，你觉得似乎是一条路想上去看看，等待你的不是道路尽头也不是单纯的地理环境上岩石硕大的凸起造成的“似乎是一条路”，而是以一个游戏外的方式告诉你“不能这样做”，一段时间内我四处碰壁，使我一阵厌烦，和朋友打趣到“赛博囚笼”。 3.地图设计不成熟-太多单陷门和空旷的地图 可能是无意，或是判定的box没有摆放好，地图上有些许单陷门。当你不小心失足滑落时，或是单纯想下去看看有什么宝贝，眼见不高的高度，和看似可以攀爬的岩石却挡住了我们身法灵活的天命人 （由于刚进游戏我发现跳跃是ctrl，而不是空格，我有点惊讶，后边我反而怀疑跳跃的意义是什么） ，这时候在绕路返回惹得人心烦意乱。到了游戏第二章，地图过于空旷，道路太宽阔，和朋友讨论我觉得整个地图应该缩小一半左右比较合适，道路上也不在有三三两两成群结队巡逻的喽罗，小妖零散的分布在地图上。而在鼠村，高台上疯狂射火箭的鼠妖，又不能让你静心探索和触发NPC对话，即使看似拉脱了视线和范围，但是依然面朝你的位置锁定。 4.不甚满意的探索奖励 黑神话悟空有区别与其他动作游戏，武器可以有刀叉斧钺剑戟，猴子的兵器只有一根棍子，因此更多的“武器“形式被分配到了类似于广谋这样的精魄上了，这样在探索上当你发现一个宝箱或者角落，时间一长你也明白得到的也大概率不是一个玩具，更多的只是强化你棍子的道具，很挫伤探索的热情，本就不见得令人满意的探索过程，在奖励上也再难令人激起欲望，探索的“困难”程度和奖励并不对等 5.难受的锁定和视角 锁定和视角问题一直是很多游戏的通病，但是在黑神话造成了更多很差的体验，首先黑神话就是一个注重BOSSrush的游戏，偶尔在boss和玩家跑动一边玩家闪避时有问题，boss和脱离视角或者是时间难以转回来 金池长老引爆小怪后接一招推手接化发时，脱离视角看不到红光鼠一次了，黑风大王会丢锁定，战斗中时不时要重新按一下，尤其是化成黑风后，应该不是我误触解锁视角，在一对多小怪时，转动视角自动切换锁定目标不够灵敏。 优点： 1.优化很不错，我稳定在70多帧，很少突然严重掉帧，针对许多低配或者是3a入门显卡优化很好（ 我是3060laptop ）2.令人赞叹的画面和演出3.过程的CG，动画很丰富，形式多样，演出震撼4.充满天马行空创造力的战斗系统。5.许多优秀设计的敌人模组，攻击方式多样且合理，很有乐趣。6，游戏难度合理，我自己应该是一般游戏水平，操作还勉强可以，游戏应该不算是苦手，黑神话游戏内boss基本上是初见或者是几遍就过了，但是觉得还是挺有挑战性的，梯度也很不错。 总结： 对于我来说，战斗方面和boss设计很出色，乐在其中，但在推图和探索上的打击是毁灭性的，很难让我有动力推进支线和主线和继续玩下去的动力，希望游戏科学能尽快推出对策，我是一个很早就预购豪华版的玩家，真的很乐意游戏变好，如果你是一个只在小时候看过西游记，但是并不对书中完全熟悉的玩家，只是想玩上一款足够优秀的游戏，目前不推荐玩

content_clean: 非常好，达到心里的预期了，但是还是有不少小缺点的，给我影响最大的就是喝血动作不明显，有时候按了但是没回到，有时候连喝两口，还有完美闪避帧判定有点太短，有时候肉眼看刚好躲开攻击但是没触发分身，还有最恶心的是一些小怪和小精英的动作交互做的挺差，我打他的时候他还能突然给我来一下，仿佛没有僵直，还有黄风地图的弓箭手小怪也是十分逆天，可以突然连你半条血而且在屋顶你还不好处理。 目前刚打到第二章，前面4小时的体验我感觉是拉满的基本上，治好了我的电子阳萎，上一个这样感觉的游戏还是怪猎世界，总的来说在我心里满分10分给9.5，瑕不掩瑜，缺点还是有的，但是作为第一部国产单机，我觉得已经非常非常不错了，加油中国制造！

content_clean: 缺点空气墙实在是太多了，很多地方明明能跳过去但是就是被空气墙卡住了，不如直接把空气墙换成墙壁战斗每次打完之后没有技术提高的感觉，缺少一个类似只狼振刀或者仁王化解一样的核心机制，黑神话战斗机制很多但是收益都不大，所以打起来很难受。场景引导太差，在黄风岭迷路很久。优化太差，经常会有不正常的掉帧卡顿情况出现。优点美术很优秀，感觉场景很精致。黄风岭的民歌很好听，音乐不错战斗方式多样，虽然武器只有棍子但是不枯燥黑神话悟空由于堆料太多而导致忽视了设计感，设计感很差，但是对于游戏科学国产单机的第一部作品来说已经是一部及格的作品了，国产单机还有很长的路要走

content_clean: 国产游戏里程碑 但是不推荐开始还觉得ign八分低了 现在觉得给高了美术画面不错 剩下没啥好夸的了地图细节不错 但是地图整体设计一坨大的 遍地空气墙太出戏了 你要么直接拿一整个墙面堵上得了 最开始还以为是什么隐藏宝箱收集品 拿几根树枝树根遮着 试了半天全是空气墙 还有时不时的超级闪光弹 眼睛要瞎掉了动作系统拖沓乏味缺乏反馈 武器系统更是重量级 虽然经典形象确实是棍子但你这玩意和西游记本体都差了十个十万八千里了 随便加点别的起码没那么无聊 而且就哪怕是你这一根棍子的武器系统也是依托 获取途径太单一了怪物设计主打恶心人不过大伙都这样最后就是你游的社区环境啊 已经是和原神不分伯仲了 完美无缺的游科 任何缺点都是不存在的 ign应该十分的 今年要最佳了 你说了就是尬黑 就是团建几十上百层 任何社区都不缺乏一群人在到处出警辱骂扣帽子

content_clean: 当完蜘蛛当蝙蝠，当完刺客就褪色，龙裔忍者不死人，铁驭骑士大镖客……果然到头来还得是齐天大圣对我口味。目前五个小时打完第一章，死亡记录：幽魂莽死了8次找到了手感，刀郎4次，金池5次，白衣3次，黑风4次，黑熊3次，青蛙1次（去的时候就残了，不如看看招数死一次）对我来说不算太难，难度梯度设置的还算可以。手柄手感很好，风景也好，3060打了补丁后能不开光追接近满画质（除了光照）而且也就最后打熊时变火略微掉帧。说实话国产单机第一作到这程度给个95分不为过，剩下5分希望后续好好优化，把空气墙贴个封印条的样式看着也好看啊，老是会发现这里不通那里不通，开放世界玩多了总会乱跳被挡回去。

content_clean: 首先画面没得说，中式审美体现的淋漓尽致，其次便是战斗系统，虽有不足，不过国内第一个吃螃蟹的有些毛病很正常，可以忽略。最后便是文化内核，这个游戏不仅仅是一个向外宣传中国文化的载体，更觉是一个写给中国人的一封信，不论是战斗中的剧情对话，还是章节结束后的动漫阐释，都无一列外在向人们解释着什么，表达着什么，这个，或许真的只有国人才能看的懂。昨日看他人通至结局，大圣竟死，天命人重走八十一难，打败大圣尸身，竟仍落得头戴金箍下场。直至今日看到第二结局，终于懂其深意，好好好！妙妙妙！少年之梦终有实现之日，打上天庭，踏碎凌霄，方显“齐天大圣”真威名！

content_clean: 在此之前没接触过这种3A游戏，但是玩了几个小时感觉真的挺不错的，招式挺多还有变身什么的。但是真的不考虑做个地图啥的吗?就第一个叫牯护院什么的我记得，找到他的时候我的游戏时间已经来到两个小时左右，真的不认识路,我看好多人都在说空气墙什么的，要是没有空气墙，可能我第一天还在找路。还有说什么在悬崖边上有个晃悠的动作,提醒一下大家不要去那里嘛，挺贴心的我觉得，但是硬控自己两秒钟确实也挺烦的，感觉可以出一个选择难度模式，喜欢难的选难的，休闲玩家选剧情模式就好了，给那些不喜欢晃悠动作的玩家出一个不限制版，然后再弄个悬崖掉死就行了，死几次这个症状就好了。再说其他的,像画面什么的我觉得是很清晰的，然后打坐那里，哇哦，我载了好几张图，很好看，请原谅在下水平低下的描述能力，没写过评论。然后像打斗之类的，难度友好，对我这种刚入门的玩家也是很容易上手的，这也不是魂类游戏，游戏不是为了难而难，并不是所有玩家都喜欢一个boss打几个小时这种，像这种我觉得就很好，前期简单好上手，后面的难度适当提升又能带来更多的游戏体验。然后就是配乐，好，喜欢，很有民俗特色。over，现在天命人要上线了，必须让大家吃上新鲜猴头菇：-）猿神，启动！

content_clean: I wish there was a middle ground between yes and no for recommendations... if you love banging your head against a rock, this is your game! JK, but only a little... it follows the "Souls-like" formula pretty closely. If you like those games, you should like this one. Giant enemies with cheap a$$ arena spanning\tracking attacks? Check. Bosses that tee up consistent behavior just to in inexplicably change said behavior? Check. By that I mean the timing between when they tee up an attack to when they actually perform attack is variable. A big swing will take ~1\2 a second to wind up for most of the time just for the boss to sometimes take 1/4 second or 3/4 second at random moments. Makes timing not fun when you have it down, then it changes with no animation or skin changes to signify the boss is 'going hard'. Makes it double not fun when it is obviously a cheap a$$ tactic thinly veiled as 'difficulty'. So far, for me, it has been pretty, but not really fulfilling. I will say that controls feel much crisper than other souls-likes I've played. You don't feel like you're walking through molasses or that your character takes an extra quarter second after a button press to respond. I am still early game, but so far it has been painfully linear. Hopefully that will change as I get further in the game.As of right now, I would say pass unless you are really into the souls-like experience.

content_clean: 《黑神话：悟空》——绝对值得期待的神话冒险作为一名资深游戏玩家，我对《黑神话：悟空》的期待已经很久了。自从第一次看到这款游戏的预告片，我就对它产生了浓厚的兴趣，而实际体验后，我可以说这款游戏确实没有让我失望。视觉效果：美得令人窒息《黑神话：悟空》在视觉上给我留下了深刻的印象。游戏使用了虚幻引擎5，这让它的画面细节和效果达到了一个全新的水平。每个场景都设计得非常精美，无论是悟空的战斗动作，还是环境中的光影效果，都展现出了惊人的真实感。战斗中的特效特别酷炫，让我每次战斗都能感受到视觉上的震撼。剧情与探索：沉浸感十足游戏的世界观和剧情设计也非常吸引我。《黑神话：悟空》在经典的《西游记》基础上进行了大胆的创新，故事情节既熟悉又充满新意。探索游戏世界时，发现了许多隐藏的秘密和丰富的背景故事，这让我在玩游戏的同时，也能更好地理解和体验中国神话的深层文化。战斗系统：挑战与爽快感兼备战斗系统是我最喜欢的部分之一。游戏采用了实时战斗机制，战斗中对技巧和策略的要求非常高。各种技能组合和连招的设计让我每次战斗都充满了乐趣。尤其是对付强敌时，需要灵活运用不同的战术，这种挑战性让每一次胜利都显得格外值得。文化融合：尊重与创新游戏中的文化元素处理得非常巧妙。虽然借鉴了很多《西游记》的经典元素，但《黑神话：悟空》在保留传统的同时，也加入了很多现代化的创新。这种传统与现代的结合，让我在玩游戏的过程中，对中国传统文化有了更多的了解和感受。总结总的来说，《黑神话：悟空》是一款极具吸引力的游戏。从视觉效果到战斗体验，都达到了很高的水准。对于喜欢动作角色扮演游戏的玩家来说，这款游戏无疑是一个值得尝试的佳作。它不仅提供了充实的游戏体验，还让玩家能够在娱乐中感受到中国神话的独特魅力。如果你还没体验过这款游戏，绝对不要错过！

content_clean: 一个小时候的恬静暑假，一个人在吃着西瓜看着电视，看到孙悟空被欺负的情节，哭得伤心欲绝。惊到了正在烧菜的奶奶，她停下手中的事儿，静静地抱着安慰着我，那时我只觉得电视好看，歌曲动听，我们的大圣像个英雄。时光匆匆飞逝，我从小学到中学，从大学到社畜，从社畜到失业。然而她已经静静的、安详的离开了这个世界。每当听到此曲，就更加更加更加---想念、怀念和思念。独自一人，面对屏幕，回忆过往，有些彷徨。洞箫一出，抱紧达菲，心生情愫，潸然泪下。“敢问路在何方，路在脚下”大圣，这次我要当只属于自己的英雄了…………谢谢你

content_clean: 设计个什么勾八玩意，打又打不爽，场景一团乱麻，摆的好看玩起来一坨。1.探索部分，设计个破b体力条干寄吧啊，按什么键都耗体力，又没有魂的探索设计，又加了个掉色人专属的残疾黄条，上方一堆3发射手根本处理不了，下边几个小b崽子逮着你砍，体力还限制操作就算了，打不了你小怪我还揍不了你boss了，但是nm的boss房门口在哪啊？2.战斗部分，Boss难度还算简单最多挑战3次都能解决，不少攻击很难判断出手时机以及攻击检测的判定，大金头和大青头按地大范围震击，前面还能靠手部下压判断，最后一下纯靠感觉，黑风大王更是逆天，我要是把声音关了，那团黑雾的攻击什么时候打到根本判断不出来，小怪也是玩具多表面拿着大矛朝玩家猛冲实际暗藏小刀偷偷戳。大体型怪物例如灵虚子和黑熊精意外的还挺舒服，打起来远没有人型怪那么难判断攻击招式和动作。3.装备部分，打完第一章几乎没有体现任何设计，装备数量又少无脑穿新装就完事了，武器也没有什么可以整的新花样和装备部分一模一样整最新的就完事了。个人总结，画面优秀，抛开跑图探索部分，玩起来还不错，你把这坨加上就是想让人退款了，点名第二章的远程小怪哪个初圣想到在高墙上面塞tm三个小b东西的，底下放坨大肉和几个小怪，真不错大肉还会自爆。

content_clean: GOTY, EMBRACE MONKEY 🐒 This game became one of my favourites of all time, I'm so happy it's getting the appreciation it deserves and peaked 2.2 million players. It's truly unique, ignore whatever these journalists are saying about the game's diversity because its shown that no one cares. The game is based on a Chinese Fantasy Novel, 1592 'Journey To The West', 'diversity' shouldn't matter. These people are so brainrot.But to talk about the actual game, it's a masterpiece to say the least. The bosses are so fun and unique, all have such cool animations and special designs. The cutscenes and intros to the bosses are phenomenal. The spells and mechanics in this game are so amazing and haven't seen in other games before. The scenery is absolutely gorgeous, everything in this game is literally just unique, no other words to explain. The genre is a mix between a few, I'd say action, souls-like and RPG. Personally I haven't had any performance issues and I would say this is really well optimized.Game Science really outdid themselves on their first big game like this, and if this is how their first game is then I can't wait to see what they have in store for us in the future. But let's not think about the future and enjoy this masterpiece for now as it's not everyday you see a gem like this come out.

content_clean: 怎么说呢 有有点，但不多，优点就是cg做的还可以，画面也可以，但是为啥我二郎真君给设计成肾虚男了。缺点可就太多了，打击感一坨，地图设计一坨，剧情也一坨，想做魂系，但是也就boss是魂系了 特别是地图，感觉就是一本道游戏你就好好一本道 给了玩家那么多探索的欲望，那么多岔路，结果走过去全是空气墙，关键是主干道还藏得很隐蔽，玩了四五个小时又一半时间都是在找路，这个找路不是探索世界，因为不开放，就是纯纯的找路，还有就是音乐，有时候很莫名奇妙，正在找路什么也没触发 突然音乐给你来一下子，以为发现了什么彩蛋，找半天啥也没。打分十分的话，1分给cg ，1分给画面，2分给国产情怀，为了及格在给2分鼓励分，综合分6分 对了还想给我们大圣2分但是介于主角是不是大圣就不给了

content_clean: 从小看着《读者》，读着《意林》，玩着别人的游戏，看着别人的神话影视，听着别人的主旋律，面对月薪三千的质疑、谩骂和嘲笑，一项项实现的成就是对努力最好的证明。别人有的，我们也能有！游戏本身的难度对我来说不算低，画面非常精美，人物表情细腻，传统乐器配合大场面，效果非常震撼。除开第一次CG之后闪退的小插曲，没有其他毛病，完全对得起价格和这么多年的期待。俱收并蓄、海纳百川，涓涓细流最终汇聚成文明的大海，非常开心能看到游戏没有一味地追求传统，也非常开心能见证和体验这样一部属于自己的，没有刻板印象不被定义也不被政治正确左右的佳作。

content_clean: 游戏算好游戏，8/10分，毫无疑问的国产第一3A。好的地方：很多，说的人应该也不少，看别人的评论吧。不好的地方：1.地图设计或者说引导问题（别提什么魂游也没有引导什么的，没有引导也不是你这么做的）。地图设计没有一致性，同样的一堆石头，可能这里有空气墙你过不去，但是到了下一个地方你就可以跳上去。每条路能不能走，完全是靠你的脸去撞而试出来的。在一眼看上去没有任何区别的场景中很容易兜兜转转跑回地图原点，缺乏醒目有辨识度的地标。2.强烈的bossrush感。地图里的小兵对玩家来说没有任何威胁，直接跑都根本追不上你。而且小兵也没有任何击杀的必要，除非是带有蓝色火光的，我打死他我可以捡他的技能。其他的普通小兵没有差异化，掉落物单一，没有任何打的必要。打完一个boss之后只要开疾风步快速跑到下一个boss点就行了，反正所有的关键道具啊，材料什么的都是boss给的，打boss也一样会给钱跟经验。3.剧情叙事过于碎片化了，导致云里雾里。就算是叙事碎片化如魂游也会让你在游戏的各个角落中获取到关于主线剧情的滴滴点点，诸如物品的文字说明以及各类环境叙事等等。而在这个游戏中只有boss战前的对话以及各个章节的末尾才能让你有机会去有依据对事情的经过进行自己的揣测。4.猿批差不多得了

content_clean: First off, I have never liked "souls-like" games so right off the bat, this game wasn't made for me.That said, I got the game for free with a purchase of a 4080 super and decided that I might as well give it a go, hoping to be proven wrong and finally enjoy something in this genre that people praise to the high heavens. And, admittedly, it was off to a pretty good start. It felt responsive, ran well, had competent voice acting and music, and generally looked very pretty.Unfortunately, as I ventured further down the boss-grinder-corridor of utter nothingness, the normal problems that I expect of any souls-like started to appear. Sluggish responsiveness, dull and linear progression, some of the most crazy "button mash-y" fights that I have ever seen, the monkey deciding to stand around randomly for no discernible reason despite getting inputs like it's an online game with high latency, really wonky combat mechanics featuring my biggest gripe of all time which is constantly being locked in every single stupid animation for ages, forcing me to sit there feeling like I was about to pop a vein while waiting for the apparent privilege of actually getting to play the game, unnecessary running and cutscenes that accomplish nothing other than waste your time, and increasingly "cheap feeling" visuals (the game is very pretty, but the lack of environment interactivity and general physics make the world seem very dated and static).All in all, I did not enjoy it, unfortunately. But then again, I did not expect that I would. I can see why people could like it, though. But it's not for me and that's okay.

content_clean: 这个边缘机制，我请问呢？还有看似合理的地形，结果过去是空气墙。这对于探索地图的玩家体验较差，或是说为了美术需要，你这么设计，能不能去的地方差异不够突出。以及宝箱放置在一堆远程兵的攻击范围里。以及第三章的构式地图和关卡设计。外加从第二章开始，地图确实变大了，那么小地图呢？庞大的地形地图说它容易迷路，不一定是槽点，毕竟迷不迷路因人而异，同时也能加深沉浸感，但死亡后仍需跑图很久，说明存档点略少。这就是几万人中选几十个的，要求能够独立完成完整关卡设计的人锁设计出来的关卡？别的什么bug，诸如灯光之类的，boss移动速度过快导致脱锁，这些问题希望以后的更新中能够修复。尽管开头的序章能给人一种震撼感，但不难看出有些颇具想象力的镜头语言还需优化打磨一下。相较于世界范围内的ARPG来说，它的竞争力和潜力是毋庸置疑的，但视角，打击感等等还是值得再推敲一下的。总之希望它和国产游戏越做越好！

content_clean: 游戏非常好，孝子非常恶。【叠甲中】游戏绝对好评，打个差评纯纯是为了让高强度巡逻搜差评的孝子能看见罢了，嘻嘻。由于五次还没过黑风大王，打算先关游戏休息，顺便在游戏外找找乐子。本评测开放留言板，主打就是一个风里雨里我在线等你。——————————————————————————专注网络对线三十年，欢迎 点击链接查看黑猴孝子碰瓷近年所有知名游戏，吊打战神脚踢法环碾压镖客，孝子闪耀时刻合订集 [tieba.baidu.com] 以下为猿批逆天言论部分精选： “三座大山？（此处原帖大概指法环、只狼、战神）不过是生在没有黑神话的时代的凡夫罢了（大鼻孔表情）”“90分以上，蜘蛛侠2那种货色都能上90，悟空没理由不上的。”“不可能连战神4、5那种大粪都比不了吧”“战神老头环这种垃圾游戏都能拿，这些游戏给黑神话提携都不配，为什么不能拿（问号脸）”“ign和gs顶得住一发东风吗”“至少吊打黑魂系列是没啥问题的”“傻逼西方人狗改不了吃屎山猪吃不来细糠，给个不上不下的评分”“怪猎轻武器就好像是划水皮，这玩意儿也算好？”“你们是不是CN人啊，为什么要处心积虑地黑国产之光啊”（评论说动作系统不如怪猎）”哪里来的汉奸滚回去“黑神话贴吧”大伙西游记原著真看的下去吗“，”你好，我看不下去“，”当年初中看的下去，现在上班了真看不下去了“”博德这种粪作只有你这种粪人会玩，博德就算给我免安装绿色版都没兴趣“gta6预告评论区”2025年发售只是为了给黑神话让路“日语教学UP评论区”不会是因为黑神话悟空吧，正好就是20号，直接避开了（指日语考试成绩公布日推迟）“ 以上还有很多本合订集未收录作品，主要还是因为猴P如同猴子猴孙一样遍地都是，导致原帖收集工作远远跟不上爆典速度。 最后，想当面见证猴P魅力时刻，请自行前往任何一个黑神话相关甚至无关地游戏话题下文明观猴，以上。

content_clean: Black Myth Wukong is an absolute masterclass of a game. All the hype, all the praise, all the positive buzz surrounding this game...they're absolutely deserved and this is hands down, one of THE best games of this generation, not just this year. The combat, fluidity of animations, the level and boss design, the intricate level and environmental design, all the different characters and enemies, they're all very unique, varied and superbly crafted. When you take control of the Monkey King (Sun Wukong) you really feel the power behind that staff and every swing you make against your enemies. I won't spoil the details but the gameplay mechanic is very rich and varied and rewarding. There's a whole level up system that can be used to power up your abilities and spells which can be used in subsequent battles. This btw is not necessarily a souls-like game even though some mechanics are present there but the combat style is very fast and responsive. I'm only just scratching the surface of the game and trust me when I say, this is one of the best action RPG games I've ever played in a good while and easily among to very best the game industry has to offer. Easily a 10/10 for me. Well done Game Science for creating such a well-crafted masterpiece. You deserve all the success and praise.

content_clean: A lot of people are comparing this to God of War or the Jedi games but the characters and plot are just not at all on the same level. It's basically a linear souls-ish game with miniboss after miniboss but the combat is less satisfying imo. Not necessarily bad but it doesn't feel great to play to me. Something about the combat in God of War/Elden Ring/Jedi felt smoother and more responsive to me and it just feels like that's missing here. Whether or not attacks stagger an opponent and when they stop staggering an opponent feels kinda weird too. They'll be getting ragdolled and then suddenly stop caring for no reason other than it's time for them to fight back now. I think having them dodge away or something would have felt better instead of just randomly acquiring infinite poise mid combo.I might just need something to click for it all to feel right, hard to say but initial impressions are mixed. Would give a thumbs sideways if I could but I figure a negative suits the tone of the review more.

content_clean: 我现在在医院的重症监护室里戴着呼吸机花了的眼不离steam deck半分国风的音乐再没有响起我哭不出来我知道我没有多少时间了生命在煎熬中流逝终于倦意袭来我用尽了最后的力气打出了一行字这游戏好玩:)黑仁王悟空（架势像），黑凯娜悟空（打坐像），黑只狼悟空（界面像），黑战神悟空（开场像）...初体验套路差不多，创新确实挺难的--国产第一个3a算是创新吧（笑）。总体比那啥木卫四协议，钢之崛起什么的强多了，起码表里如一，3a的要素都体现出来了，164内强烈推荐入库豪华版。希望1，2年后打折到80吧，造福更多的玩家；包货到20就美滋滋了。家庭共享版可以评论有点意外，不知道是否计算好评数及评论数+1。特色是术语或描述等都很国风，不是大白话，还要脑补转换成大白话；英文版翻译估计哭了。特有规则或键位备忘：画面：****音乐：****剧情：****演出：****玩法：***创意：***手感：****难度：****丰富：****耐玩：****优化：***更新：**热情：**细节：****打磨：****诚意：****不足，bug，建议等：有些空气墙应当有视觉效果的，比如头目战时的空气墙，还要跑过去确认是否可通过。爱人如己，目前就这，看以后追评。兄弟萌，强烈建议不要第三方平台的小店买y u额，通过饰品等挂steam市场转的，高概率red信乃至封号，且行且珍惜。

content_clean: 免费获取的产品 I really wanted to like this game. I actually thought I might enjoy it when I heard it wasn't trying to be a soulslike and could be closer to God of War. I like souls games from time to time. I enjoyed Bloodborne, DS3, and Elden Ring. However, for some reason I have yet to enjoy any that weren't made by From Software. This game is definitely more like a souls game than anything else. It didn't seem as challenging as one though, for me the real challenge was using that staff weapon. It also doesn't seem to have a block or parry system, just dodging? I don't know if there are other weapons in the game but the starting staff doesn't feel good to me. I would probably keep playing if I could use a different weapon that didn't feel so wonky. A lot of this game looks good and interests me but the lack of a block or parry system along with a lack of weapon variety kind of ruins it for me. I could be wrong about the blocking because I only played for an hour, but I played enough to know I don't really want to continue with it. I can't get a refund on this game because it was bundled with my graphics card, maybe I will revisit in the future and see if I can enjoy it more.

content_clean: Black Myth: Wukong "is a heart wrenching domestic game masterpiece that reshapes the glorious chapter of Journey to the West mythology with extraordinary imagination. In the game, every frame is like a carefully crafted artwork, perfectly integrating Eastern aesthetics with modern technology, making players feel as if they are in that bizarre and mythical world. The image of Wukong has been endowed with unprecedented depth and soul, and every swing and flight he makes reveals his indomitable fighting spirit and desire for freedom. The combat system is smooth and strategic, allowing players to enjoy the exhilaration of battle while also deeply experiencing the joy of strategic layout. Black Myth: Wukong "is not only a game, but also a tribute and innovation to traditional Chinese culture. With its unique charm, it has won widespread praise from domestic and foreign players and become a shining star in the rise of domestic games.

content_clean: 产品已退款 本质上就是一个披着大众IP的小众向游戏 。为了完美体验黑神话悟空，你需要具备以下条件：（1）熟读西游记原著or悟空传，否则你剧情只能看得云里雾里一脸懵逼；（2）一台高配电脑，否则你的游戏画面将糊成一坨，根本get不到它优秀的美术画面；（3）资深魂like游戏受苦经验，否则你将难以忍受shi一样的地图引导和boss难度。这三个条件只要缺少一个游戏体验至少下降20%。好巧不巧我就一轻度单机玩家，以上条件一个都不满足，所以游戏体验极差，我估计大部分慕名而来的圈外人体验还不如我。说实话这游戏均分82真不冤枉，它根本没有具备大众化的条件PS：还有闪退问题，我tmd一共就玩了俩小时给我闪退了七八次

With its diverse enemies and challenging encounters, this game offers a ton of replayability.Ignore the noise from the "game journalist" critics, especially ScreenRant and IGN. This game is a breath of fresh air in an industry filled with a ton of woke activists and DEI nonsenses. One QoL I love to see is a minimap, that would enhance the overall experience.This game is undoubtedly the GOTY for 2024. It is a must-play for any action game fan. Your wallet won't regret the $70 investment.

content_clean: Eastern games are on a roll lately, where I've been losing hope in modern games because of western game makers, we have Japan, Korea and China dropping bangers in the gaming industry. With games that are wonderful to play, good to look at, engaging gameplay and story with some interesting enemy and character designs which shows how creative the people out there still are. There is no political agenda being pushed, no ideological messages being shoved on your face, no race grift or forced diversity being inserted for the sake of satisfying investors/modern western media.They are just wonderful games, with incredibly cool characters that are well designed, and sometimes just weird, but that weirdness of these eastern games is that makes them so appealing to me, at least (apparently, to many others too). It's the strange and unexpected nature of how their enemies, levels and art direction that shows how these games are made by people that have the genuine intention to create art, to give their customers an experience they will enjoy and not easily forget. It's developers like this one, that would reject 7 milion from a consulting company trying to promote political and ideological agendas on their games, these are the type of people that respects you, as well as they respect themselves, and these are the type of people I want to wholeheartedly support.But my recommendation is not based solely on that. I recommend it thoroughly because it is a great game, that plays really well. Despite playing this for only 1 hour and a half, beating the first boss, I had a blast. Unfortunately I gotta sleep, got to work tomorrow, but I can't wait to continue playing, and now I'm writing this, and will change it as it goes. For now, highly recommend.

content_clean: Was this worth it for a seven year wait? Yes. Yes it was. In fact, it delivered even MORE than I expected. So stoked I am able to return to monke. In all seriousness though, as someone who really really loves God of War, the mechanics are very similar to it and as such, make the game even more enjoyable to me. However, I do feel this game does take it a step further from the steps that GOW laid out and for that, it makes me all the more grateful and have all the more fun with it. The most unexpected thing that really threw me is the fact that instead of playing as THE MONKEY KING himself. We're playing as his apprentice/predecessor, which I find very unique and actually really like.

content_clean: Beat the first boss.. This game isn't for me.It's not a bad game, but it's also not a great game.Graphics look insane, but it's also got a LOT of visual noise because of it. I would often be running down a path and only notice an enemy based on the sound cue, because they'd just blend into the environment.One MAJOR downfall of the graphics is there's a lot of loading screens.. if you die and respawn, you gotta wait for the game to load and play an animation every. single. time.Combat and control of your character is very stiff. It doesn't feel bad, but it doesn't feel good. You have to come to a complete stop to pick up plants, or your character will get stuck in a long-winded attack animation that prevents you from dodging.The tutorial is also barely existent and doesn't teach you core mechanics to the combat.. but it didn't really need to as the combat is pretty easy to far.I'm not trying to flex or anything, it's just after I unlocked the stun spell, I noticed I could just sorta hang back during boss fights and dodge every now and then while I wait for my spell cooldown. Then stun them and deal mega damage.The game mechanics really reminded me of Nioh or Woo long. You have armor and gear, but you also have transformations as a special move.Overall it's not a bad game. But I just wanted to share my opinion as someone who went into Wukong with no expectations (and as someone who isn't fooled by fancy graphics). The gameplay is what interests me, and Wukong is oddly mediocre, especially if you compare it to games like Dark Souls, Jedi Fallen Order/Survivor or God of War like I'm seeing in other reviews.

content_clean: 目前游戏的DLSS帧生成可能有问题，我游玩序章就导致游戏会频繁闪退和卡屏。解决办法：GeForce Experience 更新最新驱动，关闭DLSS帧生成。我预购的游戏，全心全意支持国产游戏，但是任何玩家如果在序章就黑屏游戏崩溃，还要上网自己研究可能出现的问题，这就是游戏科学的重大发行事故。至少有问题你应该默认关闭帧生成。提醒玩家更新驱动。抱歉，我暂时只能不推荐此游戏，这是对国产游戏健康发展的态度。修改更新后画面动作美术音乐都是国际3A级别，希望游戏科学尽快修复问题，修复后和后续游玩我会再来修改评测。有遇到同样问题的玩家可以参考一下我解决绝方法。望国产游戏更好！

content_clean: inter-i9-14900kf RTX 4090进游戏前着色器渲染一半告诉我out of video memory , 忍了，默默调好。边惊叹战斗动作边打完序章，第一回的画面一出来就把我游戏闪退了，本着作为猴孝子的超级自适应能力，用XTU给CPU降频，在4k显示器上用2k分辨率，锁60帧，画质全改成高，关掉帧生成，开垂直同步，用兼容模式开。一切都试过了还是不行，50分钟游戏时间除了打杨戬就是在跳cg。玩了十多年电脑游戏，头一回让我那么难受。游科的游戏没问题，问题在我，我和游戏不适配，我配置买高了。走不通的路，就换一条路。玩不了，就不玩。那么多游戏可以玩，再浪费时间就是不值当了。我承认你是国产3a，但是你完全不适合我。

content_clean: 不足就要大胆指出来，如果连否定都不准的话又和某神有什么区别首先就是黄风岭的设计问题，实话说有些地方不特意去逛压根不会找到路，有的地方看似能过实则被无形的大墙拦住，沙门村的门甚至不告诉我门不能从这一侧打开，这点设计是实打实的不足，至少来说引导不太行，黄风岭的风格我倒还挺喜欢的然后就是地图系统，有的人说上了地图破坏探索体验感，但这玩意吧可以不用但不能没有，能开关的地图方便你探索也方便我找路，而且就算不出地图，用谏言系统代替也是很好的，你在沙大郎那有人告诉你前有洞穴，所以前面需要撞墙，搁林子里说前有虫，所以前无跳跃攻击。这种我觉着一能起引导作用，二又能增加玩家间的交互，天命人间互相引路交流也是不错的体验然后就是难度，部分常年混迹于交界地和苇名国等的玩家玩起来至少是有点基础，而部分从不或很少接触此类型游戏的人去打俩先锋就给人撑着了，有难度选择也是能方便不同玩家群体正常体验游戏的，所以这是改进范畴最后是猴戏，至少我在黄风岭被射成筛子也没看见什么有效的远程手段，我寻思着扔个棍子他自己飞回来不也挺帅的，武器限制于棍本身花样就少了挺多，如果不多点别的花样面对神通广大四字未免有些唏嘘，后续能追加新动作派生也是挺不错的当然这游戏优秀的地方也不少，不足的地方也很明显，有人为好的点给好评，就也应该有人指出不足给差评，这样总体评价才真实客观

content_clean: 从某届奥运会开始，某国人在互联网上最喜欢干的事情就是所谓“打分”，但他们看到一个红色的倒立大拇指的时候，会像某种节肢动物一样蜂拥而入地爬入楼中楼，把他们这辈子最卑劣的语言赠送给如本人这种“反对者”，用美丽的数字，来满足自己心里甚至不存在的“信心”。诚然，我们在评分上从来没输过，在现实生活中也没赢过。至于为什么本人要特意购买差评退款一键三连，我也不知道，因为以某国人喜欢虚空树敌的特性，在这款游戏发售前总会对反对的声音扣上他们最爱的帽子——声明：本人非lgbt，也非女权，更非乐子，至于魂斗罗，虽然本人在文段里引用对某些人称得上侮辱的代称，此意只是希望各位对号入座，本人无其他想法；关于某人的争议言论以及中指，本人不会予以评论。发这篇小作文的目的，可能更多想博君一笑，可能让诸位骂声满片，或者此言沉到底层无人理我，更何况一键三连无法让此国人的自嗨好评率下降百分点，因此这对于我，以及特意喜欢在一片好评中翻楼找差评的您来说，都没有任何影响。然而我还是会给我们的国产3A大作献上我无与伦比的赞美，让人性的肮脏充满我的评论区，在你们看来，即将被口水淹没的本人是你们的小丑，少量和我一样打差评的朋友以及乐子人可能会把我挂到你们最爱的社交平台、大小团体，那么，就让我在这场永不散场的炒作与狂欢的派对里，作为您眼中最耀眼的“小丑”，为诸位献上一舞吧——所有的魔幻，归结于这片土地 ；所有的乐子，扎根于您心里的无知；希望您多用扣字的时间，转发的功夫，肮脏的言论，以及乐子的心态，多去干些正事。游戏本身，我会在某天风平浪静的时候玩，票也可能会补，好评也可能会去改，具体看我心情。最后，献给这座美丽繁荣的东胜神洲：黑熊精永生不死，大圣万岁。
suggested_action: 进入负向舆情池，结合高频词与用户时长判断是否需要社区回应。
